subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Upon thee be the grace of God and His loving-kindness. The letter of his honour the Shaykh—may God, the Blessed and Exalted, strengthen him— [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبدالله علیک فضل الله و عنایته نامه جناب شیخ ایده الله تبارک و تعالی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @equality of men and women
